title: Infosys Collaborates with IHH Healthcare on Multi-Country AI-Powered ERP Transformation
detailed_summary: Infosys announced a strategic collaboration with IHH Healthcare on June 11, 2026 for a multi-year, enterprise-wide ERP transformation program. The engagement will use Infosys Topaz to support AI-powered transformation and will initially standardize and harmonize business processes across Hong Kong, Malaysia, and Singapore. Infosys will help consolidate IHH's legacy, siloed ERP landscape across finance, procurement, supply chain, human capital management, and enterprise performance management, with stated objectives including streamlined operations, greater agility and scalability, cost optimization, stronger regulatory compliance, real-time data visibility, and faster decision-making. No deal value was disclosed.
